ranking_rule: review_signal desc, citation_count desc, year desc

review_candidates.title: Current best practices in single-cell RNA-seq analysis: a tutorial
review_candidates.tldr: A tutorial-style guide covering preprocessing, normalization, integration, and interpretation.

review_candidates.title: A practical guide to single-cell RNA-sequencing for biomedical research and clinical applications
review_candidates.tldr: Summarizes experimental and computational design considerations for single-cell RNA-seq studies.

review_candidates.title: An overview of single-cell transcriptomics and its applications
review_candidates.tldr: Reviews the main computational and biological applications of single-cell transcriptomics.

review_candidates.title: Single-cell RNA sequencing in immunology: a review
review_candidates.tldr: Reviews how single-cell RNA-seq reshaped immune-cell state discovery and atlas construction.

review_candidates.title: Systematic review of computational analysis strategies for single-cell transcriptomics
review_candidates.tldr: Compares computational pipelines for clustering, differential expression, and trajectory inference.
